nasb.text: On that day, when evening came, He *said to them, “Let us go over to the other side.”

esv.text: On that day, when evening had come, he said to them, “Let us go across to the other side.”

cnv.text: 當天黃昏，耶穌對門徒說：“我們渡到海那邊去吧。”

ccb.text: 那天晚上，耶稣对门徒说：“我们渡到对面去吧。”

csbs.text: 那天晚上，耶稣对门徒们说：“我们渡到对岸去吧。”
